name: Metal Mamemon

signature_move.name: Energy Bomb
signature_move.description: Shoots a destructive energy blast from thePsycho Blaster.

description: A Cyborg Digimon that evolved further in strength than Mamemon , who holds the alias of " Smiley Bomber ". As usual, if one is deceived by its cute appearance, they will have a terrible experience. Nine-tenths of its body is mechanized, and its Special Move " Energy Bomb ", which is fired from the Psycho Blaster equipped to its left arm, possesses tremendous destructive force which is able to reliably bring down the opponent.
